chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-571 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 15-05-2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition for the time being, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
